channel.title: Posts on Projektemacher Base
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Projektemacher Base

item.description:
Make sure the assets directory is mounted (in hugo.toml or config.toml)

[module]
  [[module.mounts]]
      source = "assets/scss"
      target = "assets/scss"

  [[module.mounts]]
      source = "assets/js"
      target = "assets/js"

  [[module.mounts]]
      source = "assets/ts"
      target = "assets/ts"

Add a reference to the front matter

scss: scss/tag-ring/tag-ring.scss
js:
  - ts/tag-ring/tag-ring.ts

item.title: Developing shortcodes
item.description:
Seting up

To use the example site locally you need to set up the language files:

./scripts/setup.sh

Running the example site

hugo --themesDir ../.. --printI18nWarnings --printUnusedTemplates

Afterwards the example site can be generated or serve’d.

Cleaning up

Before commiting changes one can clean up the language files:

./scripts/cleanup.sh
